chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 92 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 22.01.2026 Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for the applicant Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for respondent It is jointly submitted that the questions raised in this reference have already been decided by virtue of Division Bench judgment of this court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-IV vs. Hamdam Paper Corporation (Pvt.) Ltd. Karachi reported as 2022 PTD 1781. Learned counsel states that the said judgment is binding on this bench, therefore, this reference application may be disposed of for the same reasons and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
